---
title: "Flow Final Conference"
event-date: "2026-06-11"
date: "2026-02-12"
categories:
  - Event
location: "University of Bern, Mittelstrasse"
author:
  - name: "Serena Tolino"
    role: "Organiser"
  - name: "Tobias Hodel"
    role: "Organiser"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/content/projects/flow/20260511-flow-conference/">
---

This page redirects to the conference site. If you are not redirected, visit: [The FLOW Conference](/content/projects/flow/20260511-flow-conference/).
